Offline-ready dataset workspace

Dataset Tools

Import JSON, CSV from Excel, or pasted text copied from PDF or docs. Review the imported questions, edit them, then bulk-merge them into an updated dataset JSON for the app.

Excel/CSV import Paste from PDF Bulk merge
Back to Exam App Question Bank AI Help Guide

Import Sources

Use JSON for direct dataset updates, CSV for Excel exports, or paste text copied from PDFs or other documents. Direct offline parsing of `.pdf` and `.xlsx` files is not included here.

Staged Imported Questions

Review imported rows before merging them into the working dataset.

Staged Question Editor

Select a staged question and adjust it before bulk merge.

Choose a staged question to edit.
